case_name: State of New Hampshire v. Elizabeth Cloutier
author: per_curiam

bassett.note: DALIANIS, C.J., and HICKS, LYNN, and BASSETT, JJ., concurred.

hicks.note: DALIANIS, C.J., and HICKS, LYNN, and BASSETT, JJ., concurred.

summary_paragraph: The defendant, Elizabeth Cloutier, appeals her conviction by jury on one count of burglary. See RSA 635:1 (2007) (amended 2014). On appeal, she argues that the Superior Court (Bornstein, J.) erroneously denied her motion to suppress her confession. We affirm.

summary_paragraph: The defendant, Colleen Carr, appeals her conviction by a jury on one count of felony criminal solicitation of accomplice to insurance fraud, see RSA 629:2 (2007); RSA 638:20, III (2007), IV(a)(1) (Supp. 2014), and two counts of felony witness tampering, see RSA 641:5, I (2007).
